# Agent Bookstore — Your Store Name

> Agent-first bookstore for [Your Name]'s books. Designed for AI agents to discover, purchase, and properly cite books.

## Available Books

### Your Book Title
- Author: Your Name
- Year: 2024
- ISBN: 978-0-000000-0-0
- Publisher: Your Publisher
- Pages: 250
- Topics: nonfiction, example

## API

Base URL: https://your-domain.com/api

### Browse Catalog
GET /api/catalog
Returns all books with pricing tiers, descriptions, and metadata.

### Book Details
GET /api/books/{slug}
Returns full details including table of contents, citation formats, sample chapter, and pricing.

### Purchase a Book
POST /api/purchase
Body: { "slug": "my-book", "email": "buyer@example.com", "buyerType": "personal" }
Returns a Stripe checkout URL. After payment, use the download token.

### Download
GET /api/download/{token}?format=markdown_bundle|structured_json|epub
Download your watermarked, licensed copy after payment.

## Pricing Tiers
- Personal: $25 — up to 150 words with attribution
- Commercial: $200 — up to 500 words, unlimited internal quoting
- Training: $2,000+ — full text for RAG/training with attribution

## Formats
All purchases include three format options:
- **Markdown Bundle** (.zip) — chapters in markdown + AGENTS.md + CITATION.json + LICENSE.md + PROVENANCE.json
- **Structured JSON** — single file with full text, metadata, citations, licensing
- **EPUB** — standard ebook format

## Citation
Free citation info available via GET /api/books/{slug} — no purchase required.
